title: Oberoi Mall is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Oberoi Mall is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Oberoi Mall, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Oberoi Mall:
Oberoi Mall is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Mall!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
